risk.desc: Potential thermal management issues due to proximity of sensor channels and IMU.

risk.desc: Insufficient clearance around PCBs leading to potential damage during assembly.
risk.mit: Ensure PCBs are mounted on standoffs with adequate clearance from walls and moving parts.

risk.desc: Inadequate grounding scheme may lead to electrical noise and instability.
risk.mit: Specify a clear grounding scheme and ensure signal returns are routed alongside their signals.
